Split the 2029 frame-agreement gate per market: no US frame agreement by end-2029 -> US folds to niche lab tooling; no CN integrator frame agreement by end-2029 -> CN downgrades to license-only with honest flag change (F-06 precedent).

quota_reckoning.survivor_convention: PROMOTE + FIX/FIX_APPLIED canonicals after all merges; merged and rejected records not counted; wave-G FIX seeds counted pending fix application (same convention as prior waves).
quota_reckoning.cn_gate_sensitivity: Margin +2. Conditional CN legs P4 could remove: F-04 (CN OEM design-in channel), F-20 (CN outsourcing channel), G-02 (CN-primary; merchant-socket gate failure kills the seed). Worst case all three fail: 35 (<36). P4 must resolve at least one affirmatively or the orchestrator re-opens a targeted top-up. Re-flagging F-06/C-12/C-21 or resurrecting rejected seeds is not a permitted remedy.
